creator: rwatson@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->patched

I've removed the links to the per-architectural installation notes and 
also removed the Alpha platform line, which no longer applies.  However, 
it may be desirable to re-add a single pointer to the installation 
chapter of the handbook where the per-architecture links used to be, so 
I've changed this to 'patched' but left it open so the www/docs types 
can close it as desired. 

Thanks for the report!
